Armstrong International ·Pumps & Valves

Armstrong International Steam Traps

Spare parts for Armstrong International float-and-thermostatic, inverted-bucket, and disc steam traps.

Parts catalog
How to use this list: Part numbers match OEM service manuals. Use the request button below to ask about availability and pricing. Include the part number, quantity, and delivery port.
FLOAT & THERMOSTATIC TRAPS - 15B / 30B / 75A / 125A / 175A SERIES 13
Part NumberDescription
A5572Vacuum Breaker - 15B2-5, 30A3-5, 75A3-5, 125A3-5, 175A3-5 (all pressures)
A5628Vacuum Breaker - 15B6/8, 30B6/8, 30A6/8, 75A6/8, 125A6/8, 175A6/8
A5779Float & Screw - F&T trap float assembly
A5253Float FR - J Series (for 15B8/30B8/30A8/75A8/125A8/175A8/15J8/30J8/75J8/125J8/175J8)
A18633Float - 15-B4/5, 30-B4/5, 30-A3/4/5 and "A" series F&T traps (all pressures)
A17821Float - 15-B6, 30-B6, 30-A6, 75-A6, 125-A6, 175-A6 series
C3484-2Float Mechanism & Seat - 30B3, 75A3, 75A4, 125A5 F&T traps
A9932Body Gasket - general Armstrong F&T trap
B5586Cover Gasket - 15B8, 30B8, 30A8, 75A8, 125A8, 175A8 F&T traps
A21348-1Gasket - 15B4/5, 30B4/5, 30A3-5, 75A3-5, 125A3-5, 175A3-5 (all sizes & pressures)
A10439-1Valve Seat & Fulcrum Assembly - 1/2" orifice, 450 psig MOP
MLF 75-A8Mechanism Less Float - 75-A8 series
D502915FT Body Repair Kit - B4 NPT connection

Part NumberDescription
D24907Replacement Capsule - TS-3 thermostatic radiator trap
D60516Diaphragm Disc - disc type trap
INVERTED BUCKET TRAPS - 880/881/882/883 SERIES 2
Part NumberDescription
880Complete trap 880 series 1/2" with integral strainer
